name: Alma's Strong Carrot Juice Mix
recipeIngredient: 1 green pepper (or whatever organic pepper you have)
1 clove garlic (to taste or to your preference)
2 1/2 pounds carrots to make a quart of juice, more or less
recipeInstructions:
1. Scrub the organic carrots or peel them if they are not organic.
2. Clean and dry the parsley and spinach leaves.
3. Cut the beet into slender wedges.
4. Juice half of the carrots and the beet first.
5. Use the remaining carrots to help push the rest through the juicer.
